---
title: Templates
description: Production-ready starter kits curated and built by the ngDiagram team
helpBanner:
  title: Need a template built for your domain?
  body: These templates cover common patterns. If your product needs something more specific, our team can design and ship a tailored version with you.
---

import ContentTile from '../../../components/content-tile/content-tile.astro';
import ContentTilePlaceholder from '../../../components/content-tile/content-tile-placeholder.astro';
import { templates } from './templates.ts';

Curated starter kits built and maintained by the ngDiagram team. Each template is a production-grade reference implementation you can clone, extend, and ship. Complete with architecture, logic and opinionated defaults.

<div class="content-tile-grid not-content">
  {templates.map((template) =>
    template.type === 'coming-soon' ? (
      <ContentTilePlaceholder
        title={template.title}
        description={template.description}
        badgeLabel={template.badgeLabel}
      />
    ) : (
      <ContentTile
        title={template.title}
        description={template.description}
        href={template.href}
        codeHref={template.codeHref}
        navigationTitle={'View Template'}
        image={template.image}
        imageAlt={template.imageAlt}
        openInNewTab={true}
      />
    )
  )}
</div>
